title: Marketability of the Stock: What is one of the primary risks associated with an...
summary: Identify the risks of using overvalued stock as currency in acquisition transactions.
prompt: What is one of the primary risks associated with an overvalued stock being used in an acquisition?

options.text: Using an overvalued stock as currency in acquisitions can lead to significant
A proxy contest for board control

solution: Using an overvalued stock as currency in acquisitions can lead to significant financial instability if market corrections occur, resulting in losses for the acquirer.
